meaning: n.荷兰产蛋酒(一种蛋,糖,白兰地及香料混合制成的饮料)
examples: Stir Baileys and Advocaat and strain into snifter (NO ICE). Pour lime into middle of mixture. Swirl glass until you get a cement mix.
Advocaat doesn't seem to need the playing talents of the former national captain. But Hong is still exerting his influence - albeit from the sidelines.
The Russian playmaker is looking to leave Zenit St Petersburg and his club manager Dick Advocaat revealed on Saturday he had been granted time off to resolve his future.
Advocaat, 60, also said he was surprised that Barry Ferguson was still a Rangers player.
Advocaat took over at Rangers in 1998, succeeding Walter Smith as manager.
